tier: Tier 3 consistency check pending O.15 tile-dynamics closure

ingredient_I.ingredient: I — Euler-Lagrange residuals from supersolid Lagrangian

ingredient_II.ingredient: II — Gauge fixing: Lorenz condition gives covariant wave equation

lorenz_propagation.box_div_A_expression: -Derivative(A1(t, x, y, z), (x, 3)) - Derivative(A2(t, x, y, z), (y, 3)) - Derivative(A3(t, x, y, z), (z, 3)) - Derivative(A0(t, x, y, z), t, (x, 2)) - Derivative(A0(t, x, y, z), t, (y, 2)) - Derivative(A0(t, x, y, z), t, (z, 2)) - Derivative(A1(t, x, y, z), x, (y, 2)) - Derivative(A1(t, x, y, z), x, (z, 2)) - Derivative(A2(t, x, y, z), (x, 2), y) - Derivative(A2(t, x, y, z), y, (z, 2)) - Derivative(A3(t, x, y, z), (x, 2), z) - Derivative(A3(t, x, y, z), (y, 2), z) + rho_eff*Derivative(A0(t, x, y, z), (t, 3))/K_perp + rho_eff*Derivative(A1(t, x, y, z), (t, 2), x)/K_perp + rho_eff*Derivative(A2(t, x, y, z), (t, 2), y)/K_perp + rho_eff*Derivative(A3(t, x, y, z), (t, 2), z)/K_perp
lorenz_propagation.expected_box_div_A_on_shell: Derivative(J0(t, x, y, z), t)/K_perp + Derivative(J1(t, x, y, z), x)/K_perp + Derivative(J2(t, x, y, z), y)/K_perp + Derivative(J3(t, x, y, z), z)/K_perp
lorenz_propagation.consistency: Lorenz condition d_mu A^mu = 0 is preserved by the wave equation when d_mu J^mu = 0 (current conservation). Verified by inspection: box(d_mu A^mu) = d_mu(box A^mu) = (1/K_perp) d_mu J^mu.

ingredient_III_homogeneous.subcheck: III.a — Homogeneous Maxwell pair (Bianchi identities from F_munu definition)

ingredient_III_inhomogeneous.subcheck: III.b — Inhomogeneous Maxwell pair (Gauss + Ampere-Maxwell from EOM in Lorenz gauge)

identification.rho_EM: J_0 / K_perp     (charge density from temporal current component, normalized by phason stiffness)
identification.epsilon_0_equivalent: K_perp     (vacuum permittivity = phason stiffness in lattice units; SI anchor in App M §M.6)

ingredient_IV_static_coulomb.ingredient: IV — Static Coulomb limit from temporal phason phase constraint

ingredient_V.ingredient: V — Lorentz invariance of F_munu F^munu under boost

u1_gauge_invariance.bonus: U(1) gauge invariance of E and B under A_mu -> A_mu + d_mu Lambda

sensitivity_sweep.sweep: K_perp / K_parallel = phi^-D across defensible range of D

points.note: Canonical value D = 18 (Ch06 §6.2.2 + App K §K.4) gives c_hat = phi^-9 ≈ 0.013156.

sensitivity_sweep.structural_conclusion: The four-ingredient Maxwell-from-supersolid closure is structural in the phason-sector Lagrangian and does not depend on the numerical value of the stiffness ratio. The ratio enters only as the squared emergent speed c^2 = K_perp/rho_eff, fixed empirically by the SI anchor of App M §M.6.
